en_source: You’ve made it.\nThe truth remains.
Even if it was only a small step,\nyou held your ground.
You listened.\n The path opened.

> You made it here
> 
> The rules were simple —
> 
> the choice was yours.
> Distance became meaning.\n> \n> and time answered your footsteps.
> Not everything shines forever.\n> \n> But this moment did.
Light fell evenly, ,\nand every shadow vanished.
The wind fell silent.\nand everything returned to where it belonged.
A moment of silence.\nThe world steadied its breath.
The record is etched deep in the sand—\nbeyond the reach of the wind.
Harmony was restored.\nEverything had been for this moment.
Time slipped by in silence,\ntucked away in the corners of memory.
The sky shifted in color,\nand one story came to its end.
The waves grew calm,\nand the sea hid its depths once more.
The footsteps stopped,\nand only the place remained.
Victory and defeat \nare nothing more than grains of sand.
The road goes on—or it ends.\nEither way, it lies on the same earth.
The distance has found its meaning.\nTime has rewarded your journey.
The time is up.\nbut the rest is far from over.
The axis is found.\nthe world has cased its motion.
